title: DARDEN RESTAURANTS TO HOST FISCAL 2024 SECOND QUARTER CONFERENCE CALL ON DECEMBER 15
text: ORLANDO, Fla. , Nov. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Darden Restaurants, Inc., (NYSE: DRI) plans to release its fiscal 2024 second quarter financial results before the market opens on Friday, December 15, 2023, with a conference call to follow at 8:30 am ET.

title: 7 Value Stocks to Buy While They Are Still Out of the Limelight
text: Although 2023 has witnessed a massive surge in relevant industries – most notably artificial intelligence – investors may want to consider value stocks to buy at the current juncture. Why? Basically, the good times probably won't last forever.
